stemHtml:
You are planning for departure in a multi engine piston aircraft under performance class B. It is a CAVOK day with the following conditions.

TAS: 140 kt
Headwind Component: 10 kt
All Engines Opearting Rate of Climb at Take-off Power: 2100 ft/min
Still Air Distance = (height difference / net gradient) x 100
Ground Distance = Still Air Distance x (GS / TAS)
1 NM = 6080 ft

Calculate the distance taken to reach 1000 ft above the runway elevation, from the departure end of the TODA, for the purpose of obstacle clearance.
